decks.notes: This deck focuses on using control spells and abilities to manipulate the game state in your favor. You will use cards like Gran-Gran, Combustion Technique, and Firebending Lesson to control the board while also drawing cards and searching for answers with Accumulate Wisdom and Consult the Star Charts. Monument to Endurance and Abandon Attachments help you survive against aggressive decks. Iroh's Demonstration can provide a powerful finisher. The deck's mana base allows for flexibility and consistency in casting spells, ensuring you have the resources you need to control the game.

This deck focuses on using control spells and creatures to outmaneuver and outwit opponents. The key strategy is to maintain card advantage through cards like Enduring Curiosity and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian, while removing threats using spells like Consult the Star Charts and Day of Judgment. The creatures, such as Horned Loch-Whale and Island','','');">The Unagi of Kyoshi Island, provide additional control options. The deck also includes access to counter spells like Negate and Spell Snare to disrupt opponents' plans. Ultimately, the goal is to control the game until the player can secure victory.

The concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw in order to outvalue the opponent. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while steadily building card advantage and setting up for powerful late-game plays. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early-game defense, while cards like Traumatic Critique and Burst Lightning offer removal options. Winternight Stories and Sleight of Hand help with card selection and filtering, while Prismari Charm provides versatility. The deck focuses on controlling the board and outlasting the opponent's threats.

This deck focuses on deploying efficient creatures and using powerful support spells to overrun opponents quickly. By utilizing mana ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo, the deck aims to build a board presence early on and maintain pressure with aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Mightform Harmonizer. The inclusion of powerful finishers such as Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Surrak, Elusive Hunter, coupled with disruption spells like Erode and Earthbender Ascension, allows the deck to close out games before opponents can stabilize.

The focus of this deck is on controlling the game through a mix of removal spells, card draw, and powerful counter magic. By using cards like Inevitable Defeat, Lightning Helix, and Day of Judgment, the player can maintain board control while digging through their deck with tablets, Consult the Star Charts, and Jeskai Revelation. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent and disrupt their strategy, ultimately leading to a win through card advantage and superior decision-making.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game with a mixture of counter spells, removal, and card draw while utilizing Izzet colors to take advantage of spells and instants. The deck focuses on outlasting the opponent through a combination of control and tempo plays, using a variety of abilities to disrupt the opponent's strategy and build card advantage. By efficiently managing resources and utilizing the flexibility of Izzet colors, the deck aims to outmaneuver and overpower the opponent to secure victory.

The focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of countering opponent's spells, drawing cards, and dealing direct damage. The creatures in the deck provide additional control options while also being able to apply pressure to the opponent. The spells in the deck allow for flexibility in handling different situations, whether it's countering key spells or drawing into more answers. With a mix of card advantage, removal, and disruption, this deck aims to outmaneuver and outlast the opponent until it can secure a win.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression using creatures like Gene Pollinator and Badgermole Cub. Utilizing ramp from cards like Llanowar Elves and Quantum Riddler, the deck aims to quickly build a board presence and apply pressure. Ouroboroid and Spider Manifestation provide additional threats, while Craterhoof Behemoth and Marang River Regent serve as powerful finishers. The deck also includes disruptive elements such as Wistfulness and Keen-Eyed Curator to control the board. Nature's Rhythm and Multiversal Passage ensure mana consistency and flexibility throughout the game.

This control deck focuses on using a combination of removal spells, card draw, and powerful enchantments to control the game and outvalue the opponent. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with counterspells and removal while drawing cards and generating value with Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation. Inevitable Defeat and Stock Up provide additional removal and card advantage, while the deck also has access to board wipes like Day of Judgment. The deck also includes a mix of lands to ensure consistent mana fixing and access to the deck's powerful spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence and apply pressure on the opponent through aggressive flying creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies. Quantum Riddler and Starfield Shepherd provide additional support and synergy with the creatures in the deck. The inclusion of cards like Springleaf Drum and Daydream allows for strategic resource and card advantage. Erode and Seam Rip provide removal options to control the opponent's board. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast, consistent offensive strategy while maintaining some versatility with cards like Nurturing Pixie and Haliya, Guided by Light.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, removal, and card draw. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up its own resources. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide early defense, while Hearth Elemental offers a powerful late-game threat. Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Winternight Stories help dig for key cards, while Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm deal with threats. Traumatic Critique and Impractical Joke disrupt the opponent's hand and board state. Multiversal Passage and Riverpyre Verge provide mana fixing, while Spirebluff Canal and Steam Vents ensure smooth mana production.

This deck focuses on high tempo plays and aggression, using a mix of cheap spells, card draw, and disruptive spells to keep the pressure on the opponent. Eddymurk Crab is used as an early threat, while Slickshot Show-Off provides additional damage. Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent offer direct damage to finish off opponents quickly. Boomerang Basics and Get Out provide disruption. The deck aims to control the board and push damage through to win before the opponent can stabilize. The mana base allows for consistent casting of spells and ensures smooth gameplay.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through powerful spells and creatures while maintaining card advantage. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early board presence, while cards like Opt, Traumatic Critique, and Prismari Charm help control the opponent's resources. Burst Lightning and Get Out offer removal options, and Spell Snare helps to counter key spells. Impractical Joke and Winternight Stories provide additional disruption, while the mana base allows for consistent casting of spells. Overall, the deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent through control tactics.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of removal spells, counter spells, and card draw to maintain board control and disrupt your opponent's strategy. Eddymurk Crab, Hearth Elemental, and Sunderflock provide strong creatures to defend and pressure the opponent, while cards like Burst Lightning, Prismari Charm, and Traumatic Critique offer various forms of removal. Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Winternight Stories help with card selection and draw, ensuring you have the right answers at the right time. Riverpyre Verge and Multiversal Passage provide mana fixing for the deck's Izzet color identity.

The main concept of this Mono Black Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful enchantments. By utilizing cards like Abigale, Eloquent First-Year and Tragedy Feaster, the deck aims to quickly establish a board presence and apply pressure. Cards like Requiting Hex and Cruelclaw's Heist can disrupt the opponent's strategy, while Unholy Annex / Ritual Chamber provide additional resources. By maintaining a fast pace and dominating the battlefield, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

This deck focuses on building a strong board presence with aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. It aims to ramp up mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to play big threats like Mossborn Hydra and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. The deck also includes protection spells like Snakeskin Veil to keep its creatures safe. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage help fix mana while Ba Sing Se provides additional ramp. Overall, the strategy revolves around overwhelming the opponent with a fast and powerful mono-green aggro assault.
